title: pauridia glabella var. leptantha
intro: Pauridia glabella var. leptantha, also known as the yellow flag or yellow water flag, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Amaryllidaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pauridia glabella var. leptantha include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties.
